mechanics.excerpt: The Inner Sphere powers have been manufacturing their own battle armor designs decade but the Successor States have only enough ser- vice to equip few of their elite regiments and special-forces units_ Power-armor troopers have special systems_ For example , all suits are environmentally sealed, allowing them to function space 0r underwater: heads up display (HUD) with infrared capabilities projects data t0 the trooper'$ screen: Advanced short-range tactica communications systems are built into every suit; while others can be easily fitted with longer-range and even satellite comm systems (though in the latter case_ portable dish would need to be set up).
